Claude-Joseph Vernet

6 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Plymouth Harbor
by Claude-Joseph Vernet
France · 1722–1789 · Pen and grayish-black ink
Sheet of Studies: Seated Man, Head of a Dog, Seated Woman
by Claude-Joseph Vernet
France, 18th century · 1700s · red chalk (seated man); black chalk (head of a dog); pen and brown ink over black chalk (seated woman)
The Beach with the Large Tower
by Claude-Joseph Vernet
France · 1734–1752 · Etching in black on ivory laid paper
The Return from Fishing
by Claude-Joseph Vernet
France · 1734–1789 · Etching on cream laid paper
The Waterfalls at Tivoli
by Claude-Joseph Vernet
France, 18th century · 1737 · oil on canvas
Study of a Warship's Prow with British Warships and Naples Harbor Beyond
by Claude-Joseph Vernet
France · 1748 · Pen and iron gall ink
